Personal Injury Law Firm in Fayetteville and Rogers

An auto accident can tear apart your life, causing serious injuries, pain and suffering, and financial difficulties. At the law office of John Barry Baker, P.A., we will pursue maximum compensation.

The law office of John Barry Baker, P.A., is a no-win no-fee firm representing clients in Northwest Arkansas. Attorney John Barry Baker is a seasoned attorney with over 40 years of direct practice experience. During John’s career, he has settled, tried, and aggressively negotiated on behalf of hundreds of individuals. He will bring his years of experience and knowledge to your case.
